settings.file_associations_hint: Enable double-click opening for .deb, .rpm, .pkg.tar.zst, .AppImage and .sh files.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.busy: Another operation is already running in the terminal.

receipts.title: Installed Applications
receipts.explanation: Uninstall removes an application from the system. Clearing the record list only removes this screen's history.
receipts.clear_history_hint: Removes records from this list without uninstalling programs.
receipts.confirm_clear_history: Only Linux Install Manager records will be deleted. Installed programs will remain on your system. Continue?
receipts.reconcile_result: System scan removed {stale} stale and {duplicates} duplicate records.
receipts.confirm_uninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall this application?
receipts.force_remove: Do you want to remove this record anyway?
receipts.confirm_remove_record: Click OK to remove the record if the terminal operation is complete.
receipts.confirm_delete_selected: Do you want to delete the selected records?
receipts.confirm_clear_all: Do you want to delete all records?

notifications.install_started_body: {app} is being installed in the terminal.
notifications.install_failed_body: {app} could not be installed. See the terminal for details.
notifications.uninstall_started_body: {app} is being removed in the terminal.
notifications.uninstall_failed_body: {app} could not be removed. See the terminal for details.
notifications.no_command: No executable installation step was found.

history.title: Operation History
history.description: Results from installation, removal, repair and terminal operations.
history.empty: No operations have been recorded yet.

security.title: Items requiring attention
security.no_known_risks: No known dangerous command pattern was found.
security.unsigned_binary: The AppImage publisher signature was not verified by this application.
security.unverified_archive: Archive contents should be reviewed before execution.
security.unknown_publisher: Package publisher could not be verified.
security.destructive_delete: The script contains a broad and irreversible file deletion command.
security.downloads_code: The script downloads files or code from the network.
security.uses_root: The script requests administrator privileges with sudo or pkexec.
security.writes_system: The script writes to system directories.
security.dynamic_execution: The script executes dynamically generated shell commands.
security.disk_operation: The script performs low-level disk or partition operations.
security.service_change: The script changes system service startup settings.

system.title: System Tools
system.description: Distribution, package system, disk and maintenance information.
system.repair_description: Commands run visibly in the terminal and may request a sudo password.
system.no_repairs: No repair tool is defined for this package manager.

about.title: About
about.description: Linux Install Manager — safe and transparent installer manager.

associations.title: File Associations
associations.message: Do you want to install file associations?

wizard.title: Welcome
wizard.subtitle: Let's set a few basics before you start.
